title: Step 1: Create a New ColorMatch Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New ColorMatch Object

Step 1: Create a New ColorMatch Object

	Click the [All Tools] - the
	 [ColorMatch] button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	The mouse cursor will change to a ColorMatch icon.
	Move the mouse cursor over the image display of the
	 Vision Guide window and click the left mouse button to place the ColorMatch
	 object on the image display
	Notice that a name for the object is automatically
	 created. In the example, it is called "ColorMatch01" because
	 this is the first ColorMatch object created for this sequence. (We
	 will explain how to change the name later.)
